nodes.label: Table Admin Dashboard
nodes.description: HTML prototype of the restaurant admin dashboard with sidebar navigation (Dashboard, Orders, Verification, Menu, Settings), four KPI cards (Today's Orders: 142, Total Sales: $4,250, Pending Payments: 8, Orders in Progress: 24), pending payments section with Verify/Reject actions, order status distribution donut chart, and recent activity feed. Mobile header shows brand name 'DineFlow'.

nodes.label: SuperAdmin Global Dashboard
nodes.description: HTML prototype of the superadmin global dashboard with sidebar navigation (Global Overview, Restaurants, Commissions, Provisioning), four KPI cards (Total Restaurants: 1,248, Total Global Revenue: $4.2M, Platform Commissions: $420k, Monthly Growth: +14.2%), and a Restaurants Overview searchable data table with example restaurants (The Prime Cut, Ocean Blue Sushi, Luigi's Pizzeria, The Grind Cafe) showing orders, commissions, and status badges.

nodes.label: Financial Resilience
nodes.rationale: Decoupling from global payment processors avoids the 'international gateway trap', achieving immediate cash availability and drastically reduced transaction costs via local P2P Mobile Payments (Pago Móvil Venezuela). Core priority #1 of the system.

nodes.label: Human-in-the-Loop (HITL)
nodes.rationale: Technology optimizes flow, but human control ensures final capital validation, adapting to local payment rails. Admin manually verifies each Pago Móvil transfer by checking their bank app before confirming the payment. Critical for the P2P fraud prevention model.

nodes.label: Commission System
nodes.rationale: $0.10 per confirmed order displayed as 'Mantenimiento de la App' on receipts. Customer pays the commission as part of total, restaurant receives it, superadmin collects from restaurant manually. Real-time transaction counter is the exclusive billing trigger.

nodes.label: Order Lifecycle
nodes.rationale: PENDING -> PAYMENT_SENT -> CONFIRMED -> PREPARING -> READY -> DELIVERED. CANCELLED can happen from any state. The PAYMENT_SENT state triggers the HITL verification step where admin must manually confirm the P2P payment.

nodes.label: Data Isolation
nodes.rationale: Data isolation in a multi-tenant environment must be absolute. Security is delegated to the database engine (RLS), not the application layer. Total data isolation is a core architectural principle.

nodes.label: Record Immutability
nodes.source_location: §1 Strategic Product Vision, §2 Mandatory Technology Stack
nodes.rationale: Pydantic strict mode mandatory for schema immutability. Audit trail via order_status_history table logging every status change. Financial sovereignty requires record immutability for trust.

nodes.label: P2P Fraud Prevention
nodes.rationale: UNIQUE(restaurant_id, bank_reference) composite index prevents reusing same bank reference within a restaurant. HITL manual verification by admin provides human oversight. Audit trail via order_status_history for every status change.

nodes.label: Edge Performance
nodes.source_location: §1 Strategic Product Vision, §2 Mandatory Technology Stack
nodes.rationale: Dependency hygiene and startup time optimization are critical for serverless and Edge efficiency. Python 3.14+ for optimized cold starts, uv for Rust-based dependency resolution in milliseconds.
